Article Title: Asha Bhosle passes away: 'With Umrao Jaan, she gave Lucknow a permanence'
Article Text: Asha Bhosle passes away: 'With Umrao Jaan, she gave Lucknow a permanence'
Article Summary: Asha bhosle passes away: 'with umrao jaan, she gave lucknow a permanence' she is survived by her husband and three children. She was born in lucknow and died in new delhi on sunday. Her funeral will be held on monday.

Article Title: Cabaret to global pop, Asha lived 'crossover' before it was buzzword
Article Text:
Asha Bhosle

There are singers who belong to an era, and then there is Asha Bhosle , who treated decades like passing trends she would dip into and then outdo.A vocal sponge, Bhosle was soaking up the pop and jazz greats long before the internet made it easy. "I used to watch Carmen Miranda a lot and try to imitate her style," she had said in an interview, "like I did later with Shirley Bassey. "Tucked into voluminous saris, the Asha tai who loved dishing out her signature 'Maa ki Dal' and jaggery kheer was the same woman who wat-ched Bill Haley's Rock Around the Clock three times just to nail the phrasing for 'Eena Meena Deeka'; who received a letter from the Vatican for her rendition of 'Ave Maria'; and became the first Indian singer to form a pop group overseas in Britain, the West India Company, in the 1980s.At a time when playback voices in India were still neatly boxed - classical, romantic, devotional - Bhosle was slipping between them. Trained in Hindustani classical music, she said, "If you have the desire and riyaz... you can sing anything." She wandered into cabaret, jazz, rock 'n' roll, and global pop long before the industry had quite figured out what to call any of it.The turning point, as many stories go, arrived with the Burmans.S D Burman first showed her how to add her own 'inputs' to a track to make it work, but it was with R D Burman it started taking root when the duo would sit up until 4am listening to jazz and rock. When he handed her 'Aaja Aaja' for Teesri Manzil, she is said to have balked at its Westernised swagger. This wasn't a tune you could approach like a ghazal. It needed breathless phrasing and a loose shrug. Ten days of rehearsal later, she owned it so completely that it now sounds like it was always hers.That became a pattern. Whether it was the smokey, rhythmic breathing of 'Piya Tu Ab Toh Aaja' or the pop-ballad ease of 'Chura Liya Hai,' Bhosle could adjust her vocal cords to match every mood.By the 1990s, when 'crossover' became a buzzword, she was already living it. "I told my son Anand, I've sung in practically every Indian language but I haven't done English," she said of her jump into the West India Company. It was a leap into the unknown that would have terrified a lesser artist. "Although the music was ready, there was no fixed tune to sing. I had created my own tune and melody," she said about merging Indian vocals with Western club rh-ythms and electronic music.This ability to improvise allowed her to record 'Bow Down Mister' with Boy George, where Indian devotional strains met synth-heavy pop. It could have been a gimmick. Instead, it sounded like a natural extension of what she had alw-ays done with unaffected ease.At 64, she stepped into the centre of the MTV glare. She teamed up with Code Red for the ballad 'We Can Make It' and appeared in a music video, matching the boy band and their R&B groove with her silk sari and alaaps. Soon after, she appeared on 'The Way You Dream' with REM's Michael Stipe for his project '1 Giant Leap', a track that drifted into Hollywood with the 2003 action-comedy film 'Bulletproof Monk'.Bhosle did not so much cross over from East to West as meet it, on equal terms. Cornershop's 'Brimful of Asha' turned her into a cultural reference point, later remixed by Fatboy Slim. Black Eyed Peas sampled her in 'Don't Phunk with My Heart', tucking her voice into 2000s hip-hop. Sarah Brightman lifted 'Dil Cheez Kya Hai' into operatic pop. In 2005, the Kronos Quartet built an album around her, 'You've Stolen My Heart'. She recorded the R D Burman classics with such velocity - three to four songs a day - the quartet struggled to keep up. It earned her a Grammy nomination.Even in later years, she seemed game for unlikely pairings, whether it was a duet wi-th cricketer Brett Lee to collaborations with Pakistani pop si-nger Jawad Ahmed that igno-red the politics of the moment.Which brings us to 2026. Bhosle, well into her nineties, recording 'The Shadowy Light' from her Pedder Road home for the genre-blurring British virtual band Gorillaz - her voice against a swirl of hip-hop, dub and electronica, with an old harmonium in the mix - in what would be her final collaboration.
Article Summary: Asha bhosle was the first indian singer to form a pop group overseas in britain. Trained in hindustani classical music, she said, "if you have the desire and riyaz... you can sing anything" she wandered into cabaret, jazz, rock 'n' roll, and global pop long before the industry had figured out what to call any of it.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel And Dianna Russini: Mike Vrabel–Dianna Russini scandal turned darker as Robert Kraft and Stefon Diggs get pulled into widening New England Patriots storm
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel–Dianna Russini scandal turned darker as Robert Kraft and Stefon Diggs get pulled into widening Patriots storm (Image via Getty)

Cam Newton brings Robert Kraft and Stefon Diggs into Vrabel–Russini controversy, widening New England Patriots scrutiny



The New England Patriots are dealing with a situation that keeps growing by the day. What started with viral photos involving Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini has now spread beyond just two individuals.Currently, the issue has taken a sharper turn. Robert Kraft’s name has entered the conversation, raising fresh questions around the franchise at a time when stability matters most.The noise grew louder when former NFL quarterback Cam Newton addressed the situation on his “4th&1” show. Speaking during a recent episode, Newton directly tied the ongoing situation to the New England Patriots’ leadership.He said, "We are not saying that Mike Vrabel is right and Diana Rossini is wrong. What I'm saying is, fellas, you are cooked if your lady publicly disrespects you. He further continued, “Is this the Patriots' way, ladies and gentlemen? The owner, the player, and the coach. Robert Kraft sh*t, he got his past in the parlours. Who is the player? Stefon Diggs Super Bowl. … And that old Vrabel.”The comment quickly shifted focus from just Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini to a broader discussion involving the franchise’s top figure.The controversy began earlier in the week when photos of Vrabel and Dianna Russini at an adults-only hotel in Arizona went viral. Both are married, which triggered speculation about their relationship. The timing and setting only added to the scrutiny.Vrabel responded to the New York Post on April 8, 2026, calling the claims baseless. “These photos show a completely innocent interaction and any suggestion otherwise is laughable,” he said. He also made it clear that he would not engage further.Russini issued her own clarification the same day. She said the images lacked context and explained that they were part of a larger group setting. “The photos don’t represent the group of six people who were hanging out during the day,” she stated, adding that reporters often meet sources outside formal settings.However, the situation escalated when Front Office Sports reported on April 10, 2026, that The Athletic had opened an internal review into Russini’s conduct. The report also noted that she has not published any stories since the photos surfaced, placing her role under scrutiny.Newton’s remarks added another layer because they brought Robert Kraft’s past back into public discussion. In 2019, Kraft faced misdemeanour solicitation charges in Florida. Those charges were later dropped after key evidence was ruled inadmissible, but the episode still follows him. For the Patriots, the timing is far from ideal. Vrabel led the team to a Super Bowl appearance in the 2025 season, raising expectations quickly. Now, off-field headlines risk pulling attention away from football. The franchise has not issued any official statement so far.
Article Summary: Mike vrabel–dianna russini scandal turned darker as robert kraft and stefon diggs get pulled into widening patriots storm. Former nfl quarterback cam newton addressed the situation on his “4th&1’ show. He said, “is this the patriots' way, ladies and gentlemen? The owner, the player, and the coach.

Article Title: Aaron Rodgers uncertainty pushes Steelers toward bold Pro Bowl quarterback solution, hinting at major shift in strategy
Article Text:
Aaron Rodgers (Getty Images)

Steelers linked with Pro Bowl QB as Aaron Rodgers drama intensifies



The Pittsburgh Steelers are staring at a familiar problem, only this time the margin for error feels thinner. A roster that appears stronger in key areas still lacks clarity at quarterback, leaving the franchise in a holding pattern as the offseason unfolds. There is no obvious answer in free agency, and beyond top prospect Fernando Mendoza, the draft offers limited certainty. That has pushed attention back to Aaron Rodgers , whose future remains unclear. Inside the locker room, though, the tone is calm rather than anxious, even as questions continue to swirl outside.Jaylen Warren did little to fuel speculation when asked about the situation, choosing instead to reflect the steady mindset inside the team. “You know, I’m not really expecting anything,” Warren said. “Whatever happens, happens. I’m rocking with whoever’s at the quarterback position. But if he comes back, great. If he doesn’t, then we’ll miss him.” It was a measured response, but one that likely mirrors a broader sentiment in the room. Warren has quietly become one of the more respected voices on the roster, and his words tend to carry weight.Still, uncertainty around Rodgers is nothing new. His decision-making timeline has rarely followed a predictable path, and last offseason offered a reminder of that when clarity arrived late into summer practices.The Steelers appear braced for a similar wait, whether they admit it publicly or not.In the meantime, the current depth chart does little to settle nerves. Will Howard and Mason Rudolph remain options, but neither has firmly established himself as a long-term answer. That reality stands in contrast to an offense that looks more complete elsewhere. The addition of proven targets and a reliable ground game gives Pittsburgh a foundation many teams would welcome. The missing piece remains the one that matters most.That is where alternative ideas begin to surface. One name gaining traction is Mac Jones, currently with the San Francisco 49ers. The appeal is not just about talent, but about potential fit. There is belief that the right system and coaching could reshape his trajectory. A change of scenery, paired with a stronger supporting cast, might offer him a path similar to other quarterbacks who revived their careers after early setbacks.The question, however, is cost. Acquiring Jones would likely require meaningful draft capital, and for a team already navigating a reset, that decision carries risk. Yet if Rodgers steps away, the Steelers may have little choice but to act decisively.For now, the franchise waits. Not idly, but carefully. The next move will shape more than just the upcoming season. It could define how quickly this rebuild turns into something real.
Article Summary: The pittsburgh steelers are staring at a familiar problem, only this time the margin for error feels thinner. There is no obvious answer in free agency, and beyond top prospect fernando mendoza, the draft offers limited certainty. The steelers appear braced for a similar wait, whether they admit it publicly or not.

Article Title: What did JJ Redick’s playoff comment reveal about Bronny James’ role? Here’s what to expect from Lakers for LeBron James’ son
Article Text:
Bronny James. Image via: Al Bello/ Getty Images

JJ Redick’s playoff comment does not include Bronny James



Bronny James. Image via: Ronald Martinez/ Getty Images

Bronny James delivered standout stats in G-League



JJ Redick’s playoff comment reveals about Bronny James’ role? The answer may not be what some hoped. As the Los Angeles Lakers tighten their focus ahead of the postseason, the tone around rotations has shifted. Minutes are becoming harder to find, and names that once floated in and out of the lineup are now being quietly sorted.For Bronny, the timing is a little bit tricky. Injuries to key guards opened a short window late in the regular season, giving him a chance to step onto the floor alongside LeBron James . It was a glimpse of possibility. But as the playoffs approach, that window appears to be narrowing just as quickly as it opened.JJ Redick’s recent remarks offered a subtle but telling clue. Speaking about how the team plans to manage its offense and backcourt responsibilities, he said, “I think just really simplify things. I think we ran four plays all game. It was just really simple,” the Lakers head coach said.“Anytime that we can feel a little messy, we just go to the post or we go to horns. I think the ball-handling component with getting Smart back, he will be able to play more on Sunday. Him, Luke, whoever that third guard is off the bench, and LeBron all have to share in that responsibility, and part of that responsibility is getting us organized,” Redick added.There was no mention of Bronny. Not directly, at least. Instead, the phrase “whoever that third guard is” stood out. It left room for interpretation, but it also suggested that his spot is far from secure.That omission matters more in the postseason. Coaches lean on experience and trust. If players like Marcus Smart and Luke Kennard are available, they naturally move ahead in the pecking order. And of course, his father LeBron James is there.Bronny’s recent run has been steady but modest. Over the past stretch, he has averaged 5.0 points, 1.0 assists, and 0.8 rebounds in limited minutes. Useful numbers, but not enough to demand a guaranteed playoff role on a team with veteran depth.Away from the NBA spotlight, Bronny’s development has shown more promise. His time in the G League offered longer stretches on the court and a chance to grow into his game. There was even a viral stat line claiming he dropped 41 points, 11 rebounds, and 15 assists in a finals game. It spread quickly. It was also not real.Still, the attention speaks to the curiosity around his progress. Bronny has been solid at that level, even if the numbers are not as eye-catching as social media might suggest. More importantly, he has handled the transition between leagues while staying ready for opportunities.Right now, his role feels tied to circumstance. If injuries linger or a rotation needs a spark, his name could come up. Otherwise, the playoffs may become more about learning from the bench than contributing to it.
Article Summary: Bronny james has been playing well in the g-league for the los angeles lakers. He has averaged 5.0 points, 1.0 assists, and 0.8 rebounds in limited minutes. But that is not enough to demand a guaranteed playoff role on a veteran team.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma retires hurt; Ritika Sajdeh's reaction breaks the internet
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

NEW DELHI: After a batting onslaught led by Phil Salt, Virat Kohli and skipper Rajat Patidar lit up the Wankhede Stadium, defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru piled up a daunting 240/4 against Mumbai Indians. With the target set, all eyes turned to Rohit Sharma , known for his ability to dismantle any bowling attack.Rohit began cautiously in the steep chase before shifting gears, but his innings was cut short by injury. At the end of the fifth over, bowled by Krunal Pandya, Rohit appeared to be struggling with his hamstring. He signalled for the physio and received treatment on the field, but with the discomfort worsening, he eventually walked off retired hurt after scoring 19 off 13 balls. Cameras soon captured a dejected reaction from his wife Ritika Sajdeh in the stands.Earlier, RCB’s top order had delivered a batting masterclass. Salt smashed 78 off 36 balls, stitching a 120-run opening stand with Kohli, who made 50 off 38 balls. Patidar then continued the carnage with a blistering 53 off just 20 deliveries, adding 65 runs with Kohli. A late cameo from Tim David (34* off 16) ensured RCB finished with a massive total.After being put in to bat, Kohli set the tone early by taking down Trent Boult, while Salt soon joined the assault. The duo dominated both Boult and Jasprit Bumrah, racing to 71/0 in the powerplay.Salt was particularly severe on Mitchell Santner and Mayank Markande, reaching his fifty in just 25 balls. Kohli soon followed suit, bringing up RCB’s 100 in 8.4 overs.The breakthrough came via Shardul Thakur, who ended the opening stand at 120. Patidar then took charge, launching a brutal counterattack, including three successive sixes off Markande. He raced to a 17-ball fifty before falling to Santner.Despite wickets at intervals, RCB’s momentum never dipped. Contributions from Jitesh Sharma and the finishing flourish from Tim David pushed the total to 240/4.For Mumbai Indians, Shardul, Hardik Pandya, Santner and Boult picked up a wicket each, but the bowlers were largely at the receiving end of a relentless RCB batting display.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru piled up a daunting 240/4 against mumbai indians. Phil salt, virat kohli and skipper rajat patidar lit up the wankhede stadium. With the target set, all eyes turned to rohit sharma, known for his ability to dismantle any bowling attack. But sharma was forced to retire hurt after scoring 19 off 13 balls.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Virat Kohli loses cool, throws helmet and gloves after dismissal vs Mumbai Indians
Article Text:
Virat Kohli (Image credit: X)

NEW DELHI: Virat Kohli looked in ominous touch at the Wankhede Stadium, anchoring Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s batting effort with composure and control. He rotated strike smartly and allowed Phil Salt - who was in destructive form - to dominate the bowling. Salt’s blistering knock, along with half-centuries from skipper Rajat Patidar and Kohli, and a late flourish from Tim David, powered RCB to a daunting 240/4 against Mumbai Indians Salt smashed 78 off 36 balls, sharing a 120-run opening stand with Kohli, who made 50 off 38 deliveries. Patidar then kept the momentum going with a 20-ball 53, adding 65 runs with Kohli, before David’s unbeaten 34 off 16 balls provided the finishing touches.In response, Mumbai Indians managed 222/5, falling short despite a promising start. RCB spinner Suyash Sharma delivered the decisive blow with a double strike in the eighth over, halting the chase at a crucial stage.However, one of the most talked-about moments came after Kohli’s dismissal.Having reached his second fifty of the season, Kohli was removed by Hardik Pandya.As he walked back to the pavilion, the usually composed batter was visibly furious. In a moment that quickly went viral, Kohli vented his frustration by throwing his helmet and gloves, reflecting his hunger for a bigger score despite a solid contribution.RCB, the defending champions, have played four matches so far this season, winning three and losing one.With this win, RCB climbed to third on the points table and will next face Lucknow Super Giants on April 15.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru beat mumbai indians by eight wickets. Virat kohli and phil salt top scored with half-centuries for rcb. Tim david added 34 runs for the third wicket with kohli. Mumbai indians were bowled out for 222 in their innings.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz reacts as Jannik Sinner wins Monte Carlo final equals Novak Djokovic feat and takes back world number one
Article Text:
Carlos Alcaraz reacts as Jannik Sinner wins Monte Carlo final equals Novak Djokovic feat and takes back world number one (Image via Getty)

Carlos Alcaraz praises Jannik Sinner after Monte-Carlo Masters final and rare Novak Djokovic record



Jannik Sinner beats Carlos Alcaraz in Monte-Carlo final to reclaim World No 1 ATP ranking

Carlos Alcaraz walked off the court in Monte-Carlo with a smile, even after losing the final. On Sunday, Jannik Sinner beat Carlos Alcaraz 7-6, 6-3 to win the Monte-Carlo Masters title. With this win, Sinner did something very rare. He matched a big record earlier set by Novak Djokovic , and also climbed back to World No. 1 in the ATP rankings. This match was not just about the trophy. It showed how strong this young rivalry has become. Both players are pushing each other to a higher level every time they meet.After the match, Carlos Alcaraz spoke honestly about Jannik Sinner’s performance. He did not hide anything and gave full credit.“Jannik, it’s impressive what you are doing. Just the second man in the Open Era to win the Sunshine Double and then Monte-Carlo,” Alcaraz said, as reported by journalist Jose Morgado.This is a very big achievement. Before Sinner, only Novak Djokovic had done this in 2015. That shows how special Sinner’s run has been this season.Alcaraz’s reaction also showed the respect between the two players. Even in defeat, he clearly understood how tough Sinner has become.Their matches are no longer one-sided. Every point now feels important, and both players are learning from each other.The match itself had many ups and downs. Carlos Alcaraz started fast and took a 2-0 lead in the first set. But Jannik Sinner stayed calm and slowly came back. He broke Alcaraz’s serve and pushed the set into a tiebreak.At 6-5, Alcaraz looked close to winning the set. But a few mistakes at the net gave Sinner a chance. He took it and won the tiebreak.In the second set, Sinner looked more in control. He broke Alcaraz early and kept the pressure on. Some missed drop shots from Alcaraz also made things easier for Sinner. From there, Sinner finished the match strongly.With this win, Sinner moved back to World No. 1. He is now ahead of Alcaraz by 160 points. He is also on a 17-match winning streak. His last loss came in February in Doha against Jakub Mensik.Speaking after the match to Sky Sports, Sinner said, “Getting back to No. 1 means a lot to me. At the same time, the ranking is secondary. I’m very happy to win at least one big trophy on this surface.”This win is special because clay has not always been his best surface. But now, he has proved he can win anywhere.
Article Summary: Jannik sinner beat carlos alcaraz 7-6, 6-3 to win the monte-carlo masters title. With this win, sinner did something very rare. He matched a big record earlier set by novak djokovic and also climbed back to world no. 1 in the atp rankings.

Article Title: MS Dhoni comparison for Sanju Samson! CSK coach makes big statement after first IPL 2026 win
Article Text:
Sanju Samson, MS Dho

Watch Stephen Fleming on CSK’s revamp, bowling pressure & impact player rule Stephen Fleming on CSK’s revamp, bowling pressure & impact player rule

Sanju Samson returned to form with a hundred as Chennai Super Kings beat Delhi Capitals by 23 runs to record their first win of IPL 2026 in Chennai on Saturday."I've had the privilege to spend many years playing, being involved with Dhoni, he's one of the calmest cricketers I've ever come across. And Sanju Samson's not far behind that, he just understands the game from that perspective, I've seen no panic, no sense of practising more, doing more, maybe even less," Simons said in the post-match press conference, as cited by news agency ANI.After three low scores for his IPL team, Samson responded with a hundred against Delhi Capitals in Chennai. It was Samson’s fourth IPL hundred, his first for CSK and the first of IPL 2026. He reached the century in 52 balls. He also went past MS Dhoni’s record for the highest score by a designated CSK wicketkeeper in the IPL, which was 84 against Royal Challengers Bengaluru in 2019.Simons said a player of Samson’s level will come out of a lean phase. He added that there was no doubt about Samson’s ability and that players need to trust their skills, stay confident and be patient."When you've got the class of a player like him, you know it's just temporary if you have a bad run of form and sometimes it's about luck, he got a great delivery from (Nandre) Burger at one game, it's just the way it goes, one ball goes for four to the boundary, he edges one, he gets caught, so there was never any doubt that this was coming and I think the mindset of a cricketer of his stature is important, you've just got to keep trusting him, believing in your quality and certainly he's got that sort of an abundance," Simons added.Samson became the first batter in IPL history to score centuries for three teams after his first hundred for CSK.He scored 115 not out off 56 balls, with 11 fours and four sixes, at a strike rate of 205.36. Of his four IPL hundreds, two came for Rajasthan Royals in 2019 and 2021, and one for Delhi Capitals in 2017.Samson also reached 400 sixes in T20s, becoming the fourth Indian to do so after Rohit Sharma (554), Virat Kohli (441) and Suryakumar Yadav (442). He now has 401 sixes in the format.
Article Summary: Sanju samson returned to form with a hundred as chennai super kings beat delhi capitals by 23 runs. It was samson’s fourth ipl hundred, his first for csk and the first of ipl 2026. He scored 115 not out off 56 balls, with 11 fours and four sixes, at a strike rate of 205.36.

NEW DELHI: Kolkata Knight Riders’ young batter Angkrish Raghuvanshi climbed to third place in the IPL 2026 Orange Cap standings. The right-hander has amassed 155 runs from four matches, combining fluency with consistency to emerge as one of KKR’s standout performers this season.His teammate and skipper Ajinkya Rahane has also made notable progress, climbing to fifth in the run charts with 124 runs in four games. Rahane’s composed approach at the top has complemented Raghuvanshi’s strokeplay, giving KKR a solid batting foundation.At the top of the leaderboard, Yashasvi Jaiswal continues to hold the Orange Cap with 170 runs in three matches.The Rajasthan Royals opener has been in sublime touch, scoring at a brisk strike rate of 163.46 while maintaining remarkable consistency.Close on his heels is Sameer Rizvi of Delhi Capitals, who occupies the second spot with 160 runs at a strike rate of 161.62, showcasing his aggressive intent.Sunrisers Hyderabad’s Heinrich Klaasen sits fourth with 145 runs, continuing his reputation as a destructive middle-order batter. His ability to accelerate in crucial phases has made him a key figure in SRH’s batting line-up.The competition for the Orange Cap remains intense, with several batters not far behind. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has impressed with his fearless approach, scoring 122 runs at a staggering strike rate of 248.98, while Rohit Sharma and Jos Buttler continue to provide consistency at the top.Among others, Devdutt Padikkal, Shubman Gill and Virat Kohli have also made strong starts, ensuring the race remains wide open as the tournament progresses.
Article Summary: Yashasvi jaiswal continues to hold the orange cap with 170 runs in three matches. Rajasthan royals opener has been in sublime touch, scoring at a brisk strike rate of 163.46. Angkrish raghuvanshi climbed to third place in the ipl 2026 orange cap standings.

Article Title: “I love her to death…”: Mike Vrabel’s confession about his wife sparks concern amid alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s confession about his wife sparks concern amid alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel’s confession about his wife resurfaces as he faces an alleged affair scandal with Dianna Russini



Dianna Russini might face a setback in her career because of alleged affair drama with Mike Vrabel



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter, Dianna Russini, have found themselves in the eye of a storm as their alleged affair drama sparks shockwaves across the league.While this has had an effect on Dianna Russini’s career as she has been reportedly sidelined by The Athletic, the New England Patriots have not yet made any such move on Mike Vrabel.The New England Patriots’ head coach and former NFL player, Mike Vrabel, has been with his wife, Jennifer Vrabel, with whom he shares two adult sons, since they attended college together.While Mike Vrabel and Jennifer Vrabel continue to live pretty private lives, the head coach’s words about his wife have sparked chaos.A few years ago, in an interview, as Mike Vrabel explained how his wife has supported him, he said, “I love her to death. She’s been through a lot, and she understands this league.”For the unversed, Mike Vrabel has been married to his wife, Jennifer Vrabel, since 1999 and has always remained relatively private.While Jennifer Vrabel did show up at a few matches to be there for Mike Vrabel, she has maintained her fair share of distance from the alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini.Interestingly, Dianna Russini’s husband, senior manager at Shake Shack, Kevin Goldschmidt has also stayed silent and kept his distance from the scandal.Earlier this week, when Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel’s pictures from an upscale hotel went viral, The Athletic defended their reporter’s actions.In a statement, The Athletic’s executive editor, Steven Ginsberg, stood by the popular NFL insider as he said, “These photos are misleading and lack essential context. These were public interactions in front of many people.”The statement added, “Dianna is a premier journalist covering the NFL and we’re proud to have her at The Athletic.”However, things reportedly changed when the pictures sparked outrage among fans. As per Post, sources have revealed that there is a chance that Dianna Russini might lose her job.Neither Dianna Russini nor The Athletic has commented on this yet.For now, all eyes are on what Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini plan to do next after they have strongly denied any rumors of an alleged affair between them.
Article Summary: Mike vrabel’s confession about his wife sparks concern amid alleged affair drama with dianna russini. The new england patriots’ head coach and the new york times’ popular nfl reporter have found themselves in the eye of a storm. Sources have revealed that there is a chance that diannarussini might lose her job.

Article Title: IPL 2026 controversy: RR manager Romi Bhinder violates PMOA protocol by using phone in dugout
Article Text:
RR manager Romi Bhinder violates PMOA protocol (Screengrab)

Watch How Justin Langer’s belief helped Mukul Choudhary shine How Justin Langer’s belief helped Mukul Choudhary shine

Poll Should team managers be allowed to use phones in the dugout during matches? Yes, it should be allowed No, it distracts from the game

NEW DELHI: Rajasthan Royals manager Romi Bhinder was spotted using a mobile phone in the team's dugout during his team's game against Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Guwahati on Friday, violating the PMOA (Players and Match Officials Area) protocol by doing so.The incident occurred during the 11th over of the RR chase when Bhinder was using his phone and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, sitting to his right, was peeping at his screen.According to the "PMOA PROTOCOL – 2026" published on the IPL 's official website, a manager may carry a phone, but using it in the dugout is not permitted.Here's what the protocol says:PHONESMobile Phones and other electronic communications equipment are not allowed to be used in the PMOA other than for a few members of the team.* The Team Manager may use a phone in the Dressing Room area but NOT in the DugoutBesides the team manager, the media manager is allowed to have a phone in the PMOA area, but usage is clearly defined in the protocol, which was published before the tournament got underway. Bhinder could face trouble for the act and may well be summoned by the match referee and anti-corruption unit. The incident has now gone viral on social media timelines, and it remains to be seen how the IPL Governing Council addresses it."Managers and media managers carry the phone but the rules regarding its use are very clear. Using it in the dugout is a serious lapse because Romi was sitting next to players who looked at his screen when he was scrolling. There is no grey area here and now it's up to the officials to investigate the matter," says an IPL official.IPL founding chairman Lalit Modi also made a post on X regarding the incident, urging the Governing Council to take "IMMEDIATE ACTION".Dressing Rooms, Players’ external match viewing areas, TV/Third Umpire area, Match Referee’s room, Players’ and Match Officials’ dining areas, Dugouts, Any other area identified by the BCCI Anti-Corruption and Security Manager are all part of the PMOA, and two BCCI Anti-Corruption Managers, appointed by the Head of the BCCI Anti-Corruption and Security Unit (ACSU) are responsible for ensuring proper arrangements at least 30 minutes before the teams' arrivals.Before entering the field, players and support staff deposit their phones and retrieve them only after the game concludes. Only a few team members are allowed to use phones or other communication devices, but the usage guidelines are clearly listed in the PMOA protocol document.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals manager romi bhinder was spotted using a mobile phone in the team's dugout during his team's game against royal challengers bengaluru. The incident occurred during the 11th over of the rr chase. Bhinder could face trouble for the act and may well be summoned by the match referee and anti-corruption unit.

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi blitz scripts history, powers Rajasthan Royals to...
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (BCCI Photo)

Watch How Justin Langer’s belief helped Mukul Choudhary shine How Justin Langer’s belief helped Mukul Choudhary shine

Highest Powerplay totals

in IPL

125/0 - SRH vs DC, Delhi, 2024

107/0 - SRH vs LSG, Hyderabad, 2024

105/0 - KKR vs RCB, Bengaluru, 2017

100/2 - CSK vs PBKS, Wankhede, 2014

97/1 - RR vs RCB, Guwahati, 2026*

94/1 - SRH vs RR, Hyderabad, 2025

NEW DELHI: Rajasthan Royals produced a stunning batting display as young sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powered them to a record-breaking start against Royal Challengers Bengaluru in IPL 2026.Chasing 202, RR raced to 97/1 in the Powerplay, their highest-ever total in the first six overs and one of the best in IPL history.Sooryavanshi, who was dismissed for 78 runs off 26, led the charge inside the powerplay with a blistering 57 off just 18 balls, while Dhruv Jurel supported him with a quick 27 off 10 balls.The sixth over alone produced 24 runs, underlining RR’s dominance.This effort placed RR among the top Powerplay scores in IPL history, just behind some explosive totals by Sunrisers Hyderabad and Kolkata Knight Riders.The aggressive approach ensured RR took early control of the chase, putting immense pressure on RCB’s bowling attack.Earlier, RCB had posted 201/8, largely thanks to a fighting knock from captain Rajat Patidar , who scored 63 off 40 balls. Walking in during a collapse, Patidar steadied the innings and kept the scoreboard ticking despite wickets falling at the other end. Virat Kohli had provided a quick start with 32 off 16 balls but fell trying to accelerate.RR’s bowlers, led by Jofra Archer and Ravi Bishnoi, triggered a middle-order collapse, reducing RCB to 94/6 at one stage. Bishnoi’s variations proved crucial, while Brijesh Sharma impressed with key breakthroughs.However, a late surge from Impact Sub Venkatesh Iyer, who smashed 29 off 15 balls including 21 runs in the final over, pushed RCB past the 200-run mark. Despite the late flourish, the total appeared slightly below par on a surface offering bounce but also value for shots.In response, RR’s fearless approach in the Powerplay, spearheaded by Sooryavanshi, turned the game decisively in their favour, scripting a memorable night and showcasing the arrival of a new batting star in the IPL.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals beat royal challengers bengaluru in ipl 2026. Rr raced to 97/1 in the powerplay, their highest-ever total in the first six overs. Sooryavanshi led the charge inside the powerplay with a blistering 57 off just 18 balls.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
